name: Bread in Jars: Chocolate Applesauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Place a baking sheet on the middle rack and remove the top rack from the oven.
2. Wash 8 (1-pint) wide mouth canning jars with lids in hot soapy water, then drain, dry, and cool to room temperature. Generously coat the inside of each jar with margarine.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine margarine, sugar, eggs, vanilla, almond extract, and applesauce. Mix until well combined.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Add to the wet mixture in several additions until just moistened.
5. Spoon 1 level cupful of batter into each jar. Clean the rims with a moistened paper towel.
6. Place the jars on the baking sheet in the center of the oven. Bake for 40 minutes.
7. Keep the lids in hot water until ready to use. When the cakes are done, remove the jars from the oven one at a time.
8. If needed, clean the rims with a moistened paper towel. Place the lids and rings on tightly shut.
9. Place the jars on a wire rack to cool. Once cooled, decorate as desired (e.g., add round pieces of cloth, flowers, ribbons, etc.). Unscrew the ring, place cotton balls on top of the lid, and screw the ring back on.
